name: Privacy Policy
description: Markdown-based note-taking application with optional cloud collaboration

data_collection.user_content: Notes are stored locally by default. Notes are only stored in the cloud if the user explicitly enables collaboration features.

data_storage.local_storage: Notes are stored locally on the user's device by default
data_storage.cloud_storage: If collaboration is used, notes are stored in Supabase databases

data_sharing: We do not sell or share user data with third parties except as required to operate the service (Supabase and Stripe).
security: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect user data, including encryption.
international_transfers: Data may be processed in regions where Supabase or Stripe operate. Appropriate safeguards are used where required.
changes: We may update this policy. Continued use of the service means you accept the updated policy.
